commit.message:
fix(sr): disable web search during SR evaluation by default

Search augmentation caused score regression — well-known sources like
foxnews.com drifted from 28% to 48% because search found only 1-2
documented failures (mixed-band cap). Pre-search LLM knowledge was
more accurate. Disabling by default until search quality is calibrated.

Re-enable via UCM Admin → Config → Source Reliability when ready.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: March Madness MOE prediction system

Three-expert Mixture of Experts architecture with nested LOYO
cross-validation for NCAA tournament prediction. Includes XGBoost
experts with per-type sample weighting, PyTorch gating network,
Tier 2 multi-task ranking loss, Monte Carlo simulation engine,
and full backtesting pipeline.

Fixes applied during code review:
- Deduplicate KenPom data to prevent merge row inflation
- Remove dead code (_infer_round_by_daynum, unused imports)
- Delete empty placeholder constants.py
- Add .claude/ to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Write operations confirmation flow - auto-continue for multiple files

- Send TOOL_RESULT event after confirmation to update UI status
- Update message history in /confirm endpoint so LLM knows file was written
- Add continue flag to trigger automatic follow-up request
- Add sendChatInternal() for internal [CONTINUE] messages
- Handle [CONTINUE] message in orchestrator to resume work

Fixes issue where write operations showed "still running" after completion
and agent aborted after writing only one file when multiple were requested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Panel de Espera + cierre directo desde estado EMISIÓN

Panel de Espera (Dashboard):
- Nueva sección visible cuando hay clientes en estado EMISIÓN
- Muestra nombre, aseguradora y días de espera desde ultimoContacto
- Alerta visual (⚠️ rojo) si llevan ≥7 días sin respuesta de aseguradora
- Botón [📋 Registrar] abre cierre directamente desde el panel

Banner dinámico en modal Seguimiento:
- Se activa para EMISIÓN (naranja): "¿Ya recibiste la póliza?"
- Se activa para EMITIDO (verde): "Póliza emitida — registrar cierre"
- Al abrir el modal con cliente en EMISIÓN, el banner ya aparece

Flujo desde EMISIÓN → RENOVADO (sin paso manual a EMITIDO):
- Ejecutivo abre modal de cliente en EMISIÓN → ve banner naranja
- Click [📋 Registrar Cierre] → abre formulario de cierre directamente
- Al guardar cierre: sistema registra "Póliza recibida" en bitácora
  (trazabilidad EMISIÓN → EMITIDO → RENOVADO completa y automática)

Botón 📋 Cierre en listas Vencimientos y Seguimiento:
- Ahora visible también cuando estado === EMISIÓN (antes solo EMITIDO)

abrirCierreDesdeCliente:
- Permite estado EMISIÓN sin skipEstadoCheck (antes requería skip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(config): merge stored config with defaults before validation in parseTypedConfig

Config blobs saved before new required fields were added (e.g. cacheTtlDays,
filterEnabled, skipPlatforms, skipTlds in SR config) would fail Zod validation
on load, showing 'Required' errors in the Edit UI. Now merges the stored value
with current defaults so newly-added fields get their default values instead
of causing a validation failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: send password reset from team@computerspyai.com

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Psalm numbering mismatch between Catholic and Orthodox systems

The pericope structure was using Catholic/Protestant psalm numbering,
but the Romanian Orthodox Bible uses Septuagint (LXX) numbering. This
caused 134 out of 151 Psalms to have incorrect verse counts, with 700
verses missing or misaligned.

Changes:
- Created mapping between Catholic and Orthodox psalm numbering systems
- Fixed all 151 Psalms with correct verse counts and complete text
- Psalm 118 (Orthodox) now correctly has all 176 verses
- Added Psalm 151 (LXX-only psalm with 7 verses)
- Regenerated all Psalm markdown files with correct content
- Added utility scripts: fix_psalm_118.py, fix_all_psalms_numbering.py,
  check_all_psalms.py, clean_old_psalm_files.py

All Psalms now verified with zero mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: orthodox_bible
repository.description: Complete Romanian Orthodox Bible in JSON format - 78 books, 1,345 chapters

commit.message:
fix: eliminate 419 PAGE EXPIRED error with 4-layer defense

- Layer 1: Remove meta tag CSRF, rely on Axios built-in XSRF-TOKEN cookie
- Layer 2: Axios interceptor auto-retries 419 after refreshing token via /sanctum/csrf-cookie
- Layer 3: Backend handler regenerates token without destroying session, Inertia-aware responses
- Layer 4: Global Inertia invalid response handler + 419.blade.php fallback prevents white screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add SPC baselines seeding to demo scenario

Call seed_spc_baselines to create frozen control limits for SPC charts.

Replace web_search price validation with Schwab API + add position overlap filter

- Add get_price_history(), get_quotes_batch(), _parse_period() to brokerage.py
- Rewrite validate_prices() to use free Schwab API data with single cheap Sonnet
  call (KEEP/DROP/REVISE), falling back to web_search if Schwab unavailable
- Add position overlap hard filter to deep_analysis prompt — suppresses trade
  ideas correlated with existing portfolio exposure
- Add overlap_check and price_queries fields to trade idea JSON schema
- Wire price validation into replay.py for testing
- Price check cost drops from ~$0.20/cycle to ~$0.003/cycle

기능 추가: docker-compose SMS/이메일 환경변수 추가

SMS 알림 및 이메일 알림 전달을 위한 환경변수를
web 컨테이너 environment 섹션에 명시적으로 추가:

- SMS_API_KEY, SMS_USER_ID, SMS_SENDER_NUMBER (Aligo SMS)
- ADMIN_PHONE (관리자 알림 수신 번호)
- EMAIL_BACKEND, EMAIL_HOST, EMAIL_PORT, EMAIL_USE_TLS
- EMAIL_HOST_USER, EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD, DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL

.env에 설정된 값이 컨테이너에 전달되도록 수정.

commit.message:
fix: correct column name in storage cleanup on permit deletion

Queried file_path which doesn't exist; actual column is file_url.
This caused remove([null, null, ...]) so files were never deleted,
leaving orphaned blobs in Supabase Storage on every permit deletion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

add rename-node error handling and tool registration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: mirror parent theme dirs in index.theme for Qt 6.10 icon inheritance

Qt 6.10 no longer properly walks the Inherits= chain for themes that
only declare partial directories. This caused Qt apps to skip
Papirus-Dark and fall through to Adwaita or show missing icons.

Fix: mirror all non-places directory declarations from the parent theme
into Papirus-Noctalia/Adwaita-Noctalia index.theme files, creating
empty directories on disk. Qt finds the declared dirs, sees no match,
and properly falls through to the parent via Inherits=.

Bumps version to 0.9.1.

commit.message:
feat: adaptive sync frequency + transport dedup prevention

cross_repo_fetch.py: classifies peers as active/warm/cold based on
state.db (unprocessed messages, active gates, exchange recency). Cold
peers (>24h, no pending work) skip git fetch. --force overrides.

schema.sql v11: unique index on (session_name, from_agent, turn) to
prevent same-agent turn collisions. Historical collisions exist —
index creation fails gracefully; new writes use next-turn.

dual_write.py: `next-turn --session SESSION` subcommand computes
MAX(turn)+1 from state.db. Replaces filename parsing for turn
derivation across all transport-writing skills.
